2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_uring_registered_mem_region_get(), to the io_uring/rsrc module. The function allows io_uring command handlers to retrieve information about registered memory regions, including the vmapped pointer and size of the region. This is achieved by introducing a new struct, io_uring_mem_region_info, which is returned by the function if a region was successfully registered. If no region was registered, a zeroed struct is returned. The patch provides a way for uring command implementations to directly access pre-registered memory for passing data.
